mission: Adapt one realized named workload canary into a content-addressed, fail-closed, atomically published immutable cache using upstream workload/profile/build/archive identity and shared 1xc.14/b054 receipts; attach independent expected facts and report fixture/benchmark deletion candidates without deleting them in this survivor job. Do not recreate profiles, tiers, C-03, or receipt accounting.
acceptance: The cache key extends rather than renames upstream workload/profile/build/archive identity; resource and cleanup evidence uses shared receipts; ingest failure/interruption/corruption cannot produce a hit; publication is atomic; independent canary facts validate the archive; clone mutation leaves the base unchanged; and b054.1.1.4-style production sensitivity is specified for independent certification. Do not edit upstream profiles/canaries or remove benchmark/scale consumers in this job.

mission: Extend the realized C-03 exact-session actions canary and its workload/work receipt into an independent-fact composition law for exact membership, counts, partitions, pages, preview/apply identity, and irrelevant-growth work bounds; return proposed dominated cases for independent certification without deleting them in this survivor job.
acceptance: Expected IDs come from facts attached to the C-03 workload without importing production lowering/SQL; the real repository, facade, CLI, and HTTP routes agree; the receipt names the C-03 global-first and exact-identity mutations for an isolated certification lane; unique parser, security, FTS, vector, lineage, cancellation, and terminal-unit obligations remain and no existing test is deleted in this job.
focused_tests: devtools test -k 'query_expression and (precedence or quoting or exact)'

mission: Use the realized partial-convergence and active-growing workload variants to build a deterministic real-SQLite convergence debt to restart to retry to quiescence law, compare it with uninterrupted execution under the same workload identity, and return internal call-order deletion candidates for independent certification without deleting them in this survivor job.
acceptance: Pending debt is durable and non-failure, restart/retry is scoped and idempotent, final public facts equal uninterrupted execution, debt/status reach quiescence, and the receipt names debt-persistence, false_means_pending, scoping, and retry mutations for isolated certification. No existing test is deleted in this job.

mission: Perform the certified deletion of only the confirmed retired temporal-conductor adapter, its direct test file, and its exact command-catalog entry. The refreshed dossier is the consumer/history certification receipt. Report generated references for coordinator repair without editing them.
acceptance: Only the retired module, direct tests, and temporal-devloop command entry are removed; the live branch-local dev loop is untouched; the receipt names generated references and coordinator checks; no closed-loop verifier is edited.
